title: GTA Online
headline: GTA Online
subtitle: St Patrick’s Day Collectibles
content:
Dress yourself in green or get pinched — celebrate St. Patrick’s Day in verdant attire and by hunting for new Lucky and Golden Clover balloons in GTA Online through March 25.

Those who locate all 25 Lucky Clover balloons and the elusive Golden Clover balloon will receive corresponding Lucky Clover and Golden Clover Outfits.
